The '''Trandoshan double-blade''' was a bladed weapon favored by [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshans]]. Made of the metal [[chalon]], the double blade was heavier and sharper than most melee weapons.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
